title: Gantt Chart Views
excerpt: Would it be possible to create the option to amend the view of the Axis in Gantt charts, at present it is very narrow and doesn’t not provide visablity of the name of the element you are providing information on. It woul…

posts.author: Eloise (Eloise Maybrook)
posts.cookedHtml: Would it be possible to create the option to amend the view of the Axis in Gantt charts, at present it is very narrow and doesn’t not provide visablity of the name of the element you are providing information on. It would be so useful if the width could be adjustable.
